passReports.rationale: A binding indication can affect liveness accounting without the same integrity and promoted-session boundary required for application state.
passReports.requiredAction: Require integrity, exact source, generation, and admitted-session checks before liveness mutation.
passReports.title: Binding indication can influence liveness before integrity admission

passReports.rationale: Deadline setters, socket close, and blocked-write abort help but do not prove total bounded shutdown.
passReports.requiredAction: Preserve local abort controls and add one total shutdown deadline.
passReports.title: Partial close and abort controls exist

passReports.rationale: Fixed buffers and STUN checks are useful but do not establish the required ingress admission capability.
passReports.requiredAction: Preserve these checks while adding full ingress admission.
passReports.title: Partial ingress defenses exist

passReports.rationale: The 4701 lexical locations are candidate locations rather than 4701 vulnerabilities.
passReports.requiredAction: Retain per-observation unresolved defaults unless an exact semantic disposition is recorded.
passReports.title: Lexical hits are not vulnerability counts

passReports.rationale: Fixed packet reads, a bounded application buffer, STUN integrity, source matching, and close-abort behavior are useful but incomplete controls.
passReports.requiredAction: Preserve these controls while adding the missing capability and total-bound invariants.
passReports.title: Partial defensive controls already exist

passReports.rationale: Nineteen required modules and forty-four checksum records have no bound dependency source review.
passReports.requiredAction: Acquire and review exact dependency source, license, and security closure under a separate versioned decision.
passReports.title: Dependency source closure is missing

passReports.rationale: Dependency source behavior remains outside the retained archive and cannot be closed.
passReports.requiredAction: Complete exact dependency source, license, and security review under a separate bounded decision.
passReports.title: Dependency closure remains unresolved

passReports.rationale: Raw candidate and hostname diagnostics lack an allowlist and rate ceiling.
passReports.requiredAction: Replace raw candidate diagnostics with bounded allowlisted reason codes.
passReports.title: Raw candidate diagnostics lack allowlisting

passReports.rationale: A debug diagnostic receives remote credential fields without a secret-free structured diagnostic boundary.
passReports.requiredAction: Remove credential-bearing diagnostics and expose only allowlisted structured reason codes.
passReports.title: Remote credential fields reach diagnostics

passReports.rationale: Production egress reaches direct dial, listen, and packet-write sinks without an exact one-attempt capability.
passReports.requiredAction: Require a caller-owned exact destination, generation, purpose, and one-attempt capability immediately before every network sink.
passReports.title: Exact egress capability is absent

passReports.rationale: Network sinks are reachable without an exact one-attempt egress capability.
passReports.requiredAction: Consume an exact one-attempt destination capability immediately before each dial, listen, and packet write.
passReports.title: One-attempt egress authority is absent

passReports.rationale: Push callbacks and notifier queues lack fixed event and byte ceilings with terminal overflow behavior.
passReports.requiredAction: Replace push callbacks with bounded pull events and a sticky terminal latch.
passReports.title: Push callback queues are unbounded

passReports.rationale: Push callback queues and graceful close have no fixed capacity or terminal overflow policy.
passReports.requiredAction: Use bounded pull events with fixed overflow and terminal close behavior.
passReports.title: Push events and graceful close are unbounded

passReports.rationale: Application bytes can enter before a bounded source, generation, and promoted-session admission decision.
passReports.requiredAction: Gate ingress with bounded reads and an exact source, generation, nomination, and promoted-session capability before delivery.
passReports.title: Pre-auth ingress reaches the application path

passReports.rationale: Ingress lacks one combined rate, size, source, generation, and promoted-session admission capability.
passReports.requiredAction: Perform bounded read and exact source/generation/session admission before mutation or delivery.
passReports.title: Ingress admission is incomplete

passReports.rationale: mDNS, TCP, mux, proxy, and other nonprofile paths remain reachable through defaults and public configuration.
passReports.requiredAction: Remove or fail closed every nonprofile path at the type and constructor boundary.
passReports.title: Nonprofile network paths remain reachable

passReports.rationale: Nonprofile mDNS, mux, proxy, TCP, and nomination paths remain reachable.
passReports.requiredAction: Remove or fail closed nonprofile APIs, constructors, defaults, and option surfaces.
passReports.title: Nonprofile paths remain enabled

passReports.rationale: The one-use lexical rule has zero hits and no semantically equivalent mechanism was proven.
passReports.requiredAction: Prove or add a bounded one-use pre-auth capability and exact atomic promotion mechanism.
passReports.title: Required one-use mechanism is unproven

passReports.rationale: No one-use lexical hit or semantically equivalent exact promotion mechanism was proven.
passReports.requiredAction: Prove or add the required one-use pre-auth and atomic promotion mechanism.
passReports.title: Required one-use mechanism is unproven

passReports.rationale: Nomination does not create a distinct one-use pre-auth capability or exact atomic application promotion.
passReports.requiredAction: Create a one-use pre-auth capability and atomically promote only the exact transcript-confirmed path.
passReports.title: Atomic one-use promotion is absent

passReports.rationale: Application egress is not guarded by a distinct one-use pre-auth capability and atomic secure-session promotion state.
passReports.requiredAction: Introduce a one-use pre-auth capability and expose application write only after exact transcript-bound atomic promotion.
passReports.title: Application write lacks atomic pre-auth promotion

passReports.rationale: Ambient resolver answers are consumed without bounded caller-supplied provenance and address policy.
passReports.requiredAction: Inject a bounded numeric answer set with provenance and revalidate immediately before use.
passReports.title: Ambient resolution lacks provenance-bound admission

passReports.rationale: Dependency behavior and ambient resolver provenance are unavailable for closure.
passReports.requiredAction: Review exact resolver and dependency source, then require bounded caller-supplied answers.
passReports.title: Resolution behavior remains unresolved

passReports.rationale: Remote candidate admission can schedule unbounded pair, request, and task processing.
passReports.requiredAction: Apply exact per-session candidate, pair, pending-request, and scheduled-task ceilings before state mutation.
passReports.title: Remote candidate processing lacks total resource ceilings

passReports.rationale: Candidate, pair, pending request, and task process state lacks exact total ceilings.
passReports.requiredAction: Apply per-session and process-wide candidate, pair, request, and task ceilings.
passReports.title: Candidate processing resources are unbounded

passReports.rationale: Shutdown waits and handler closure do not share one total bounded deadline.
passReports.requiredAction: Enforce one total 2500ms shutdown budget with deterministic terminal abandonment.
passReports.title: Shutdown has no total deadline

passReports.rationale: Shutdown paths do not share the required total 2500ms deadline.
passReports.requiredAction: Enforce one total 2500ms deadline across handler, gather, mux, and connection shutdown.
passReports.title: Shutdown lacks a total 2500ms budget

passReports.rationale: TURN TLS and DTLS service identity can be weakened and lacks the exact restricted-profile identity inputs.
passReports.requiredAction: Remove skip-verification controls and require exact SNI, trust, pin, expiry, and deadline inputs before credential use.
passReports.title: TURN service identity is insufficiently constrained

passReports.rationale: TURN TLS identity lacks exact service constraints and exposes a verification bypass.
passReports.requiredAction: Require exact trust, host, pin, expiry, and deadline inputs and remove bypasses.
passReports.title: TURN TLS service identity is not exact
